title: Match Automations - need to be able to select dropdown menus as the column change trigger
excerpt:
I’d like to request that match automations need to be able to select dropdown menus as the column change trigger. I realize these are in beta, so just giving my feedback to developers.

posts.author: Jordancopper (Jordan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to request that match automations need to be able to select dropdown menus as the column change trigger. I realize these are in beta, so just giving my feedback to developers.

image892×696 46.2 KB

This column selector needs to include dropdown columns.

image1388×526 24.1 KB

This one doesn’t allow you to select the board required.

image1357×445 17 KB

posts.author: jgeron-suhsd (Jesse Geron)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is an awesome and powerful automation! It would be so much better if I could match it on a dropdown. This would allow me to have a dropdown of choices in a form and then leverage this automation to connect another board based on those dropdown choices.

Right now my only option is text, but the chances that someone is going to write in the exact matching text is slim to none.

Of course, the BEST option would be able to have a user select from the connected items so I don’t need the automation at all, but the above suggestion would work.

image1141×365 27.9 KB
